entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
This covers a variety of citizenship topics. Students spend the first term reflecting on the value of thinking for the Christian life or on building helpful habits. The second term focuses on government as students explore the historical documents and decisions from this rotation. The year finishes with a term of economics where students learn a variety of economic theories.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Citizenship: Grade 10 (U.S.)

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: Lessons are occasionally integrated with composition lessons. Term 2 Government lessons are shared with Grades 9 and 11.
